zh.Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭度福利爾考普爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Esota Murray於1472年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾考普爾時，她的父親Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool40歲，母親Marjory or Mariota Menzies35歲。她於大約1499年與Herbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbie在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1536年12月20日之後在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾。

zh-hans.Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 苏格兰度福利爾考普爾
zh-hans.Ruthwell, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, Unite: 英国苏格兰度福利爾盧維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Esota Murray于1472年出生在苏格兰度福利爾考普爾时，她的父亲Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool40岁，母亲Marjory or Mariota Menzies35岁。她于大约1499年与Herbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbie在苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1536年12月20日之后在苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Murray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Moray in northeastern Scotland, which derives from Celtic mori- ‘sea’ + treb- ‘settlement’. The founder of the Scottish house of Murray was a Fleming named Freskin who was granted Strathbrock in West Lothian and Duffus in Moray by David I. The family took its name from the region in the late 12th century.
Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McMurray  .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireadhaigh ‘descendant of Muireadhach’ a personal name meaning ‘mariner’. Occasionally it may be a shortened form of McMurray .

variants.name: Murry
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Murrah
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Murray  .

variants.name: Murie
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Murie in Errol (Perthshire).
Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Merhi
meanings: Arabic (mainly Lebanon and Syria): from a variant of the personal name Mirhi of unknown meaning. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians. Compare Murray 5.

variants.name: McMurray
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muireadhaigh or Mac Muireadhaich, a patronymic from the personal name Muireadhach ‘seafarer’ (see Murdoch ). Compare McCurry 1.

variants.name: Murra
meanings: Italian (Sicily): topographic name from Sicilian murra ‘large rock, mass of rocks’ or a habitational name from a place called with this word.
Albanian: nickname from murrë (definite form murra) ‘dark gray cow’.

nameMeanings.name: Esota
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Esota Murray was born in 1472, in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool, was 40 and her mother, Marjory or Mariota Menzies, was 35. She married Herbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbie about 1499, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 20 December 1536, in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Esota Murray est née en 1472, à Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Marjory or Mariota Menzies, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Herbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbie environ 1499, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 20 décembre 1536, à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Esota Murray 1472 in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool 40 und ihre Mutter Marjory or Mariota Menzies 35. Sie hat um 1499 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland Herbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 20. Dezember 1536 in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Esota Murray è nata il nel 1472 nel Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Marjory or Mariota Menzies, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Herbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbie circa 1499, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 20 dicembre 1536, nel Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.Dumfriesshire, Scotland: スコットランドダムフリーシュアイア

ja.lifeSummary: Esota Murrayが1472年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアコクプオオルで生まれた時，父Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpoolは40歳，母Marjory or Mariota Menziesは35歳であった。約1499年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでHerbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1536年12月20日以後にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Esota Murray(이)가 1472년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 콕포에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjory or Mariota Menzies(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1499년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 Herbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1536년 12월 20일 이후 스컷랜드 에이르실르 에이르에서 사망했다.

mn.Ruthwell, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, Unite: Ruthwell, Dumfreize, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Esota Murray nasceu em 1472, em Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Marjory or Mariota Menzies, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Herbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbie aproximadamente 1499, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após 20 de dezembro de 1536, em Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Esota Murray родилась в 1472 г. в местности коккпул, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory or Mariota Menzies, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbie около 1499 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 20 декабрь 1536 г. в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Esota Murray nació en 1472, en Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Marjory or Mariota Menzies, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Herbert Corry of Kelwood and Newbie aproximadamente 1499, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 20 de diciembre de 1536, en Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland.
